text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tazuna and I are heading home just a little late
after enjoying our day out, when...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: My senses are tingling...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I sense the presence of students. Two... no, three
of them?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
They shouldn't be out at this hour... It's way past
curfew.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I'll be right back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As soon as she says that, she dashes off into the
night.
choice_data_list: (Which is worrying. It is late, after all...)
(Which is worrying. It is late, after all...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to wait until Tazuna returns so I can see
her home.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that in mind, I stay by the school gates
until...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Nooooo! How'd ya get so darn fast, Tazuna?!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That's enough from you, Taiki Shuttle! Return to
your dorm right this instant!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Nooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Ugh! You're not getting away that easily!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hyah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even as a trainer, I have to say Tazuna's
acceleration is extraordinary!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: What?! Trainer! You waited this whole time?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh... Th-thank you.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Um, am I imagining things, or... are you eyes
glistening?
choice_data_list: Tell me, Tazuna, what is it you dream of?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
My dream?! Well... It's for the Umamusume to
grow up healthy and for the races to continue
improving for many years to come...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer...
choice_data_list: What do you think about debuting as a racer?!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Now, wait just one minute! You need to get a
hold of yourself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tazuna gives my head a light tap, and I snap back
to reality.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, <username>!
You gave me a quite a shock.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I mean, really. Debuting...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪
